text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You're in a good mood, Rice. Did something
exciting happen?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually... I set a new personal record at
practice earlier!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I tried out a new running technique I learned
yesterday, and—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, let me guess, your "Big Brother" taught you
this technique?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, let me guess, your "Big Sister" taught you this
technique?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, sorry. Sometimes, when I'm reading late at
night...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I hear you happily murmuring "Thank you, Big
Brother" in your sleep.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I hear you happily murmuring "Thank you, Big
Sister" in your sleep.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: S-sorry. I wasn't trying to tease you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I can only imagine how incredible they must be
for you to be so thankful.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... Big Brother is the best trainer ever!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... Big Sister is the best trainer ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower talks excitedly for a while, sharing
many words of admiration.
